report.summary: Community growth cycle v12 (Mar 17): FOMC Day 1 — Fed meeting starts today, decision tomorrow 2PM ET; BTC at $73,700 on 8-day winning streak (+25% from Feb $60K bottom); market cap $2.65T (+3.6%); ETH +13% weekly on $1.3B March ETF inflows; 5 Twitter posts drafted (FOMC Day 1 explainer, BTC streak + sell-the-news pattern, ETH rebound + Pectra, AI tokens + Nvidia catalyst, market snapshot); Discord FOMC Day 1 briefing; newsletter FOMC recap template for Thursday; 1 social card created (FOMC Day 1 market rally with BTC chart, 3-scenario panel, dot plot explainer); posting schedule updated through Mar 22.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet 1 (Tue PM): FOMC Day 1 — meeting starts today, decision tomorrow 2PM ET; 98% hold probability; dot plot is the real catalyst (0 cuts = bearish, 1 = neutral, 2 = bullish); BTC $73,700; CTA to /learn/fomc-fed-rate-crypto-guide

Tweet 2 (Tue PM): BTC 8-day winning streak at $73,700, +25% from Feb $60K bottom — BUT BTC dropped after 7/8 FOMC meetings in 2025; sell-the-news pattern + 48h reversal; DCA entry angle; CTA to /tools/dca-calculator
Tweet 3 (Tue PM): ETH +13% weekly; $767M weekly ETF inflows; Pectra mainnet in 24 days; EIP-7702 smart accounts; CTA to /learn/ethereum-pectra-upgrade-guide
Tweet 4 (Tue PM): AI crypto tokens surging on Nvidia Jensen Huang $1T chip demand prediction; decentralized compute, AI agents on-chain, ZK ML verification; CTA to /learn/crypto-ai-intersection
Tweet 5 (Tue PM): Market snapshot — $2.65T cap (+3.6%), BTC $73,700, ETH +13%, SOL +9.7%, Fear & Greed 28, $1.3B March ETF inflows; dot plot question for tomorrow

Discord/Telegram (Tue PM): FOMC Day 1 briefing — decision timing, rate hold probability, dot plot explainer, market state, 2025 FOMC pattern warning, prep guide links (FOMC guide + DCA calc + stablecoin yield)

Newsletter template (Thu Mar 19): FOMC recap placeholder (fill post-decision) + market week review ($60K to $74.5K recovery, ETF inflows, fear index improvement); 8 new guides highlight section from v12 drafts carries forward

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: FOMC Day 1 (Mar 17): Fed meeting starts today, rate decision + dot plot + Powell presser tomorrow Mar 18 at 2PM ET. 98.1% probability of hold at 3.50-3.75%. Dot plot is the real market mover — currently showing 1 cut for 2026.
BTC at $73,700 on 8-day winning streak — +25% bounce from February $60K bottom. March up ~8%, potentially breaking 5-month losing streak. Key resistance at $75K-$76K.
ETH surged 13% weekly, leading altcoin recovery. $767M in weekly ETF inflows. $1.3B total March ETF inflows — first positive month since October.
Total crypto market cap: $2.65T (+3.6% today). Fear and Greed improved from 23 (Extreme Fear) to 28 (Fear). SOL +9.7%, XRP +11%.
AI crypto narrative surging: Jensen Huang at Nvidia predicted $1T chip demand through 2027 — AI tokens rallied. /learn/crypto-ai-intersection is timely and socially unamplified.

Historical FOMC pattern: BTC dropped after 7/8 meetings in 2025, then recovered within 48-72h. January 2026 FOMC: BTC dropped $90.4K to $83.4K within 48h. This pattern is the core of DCA calculator positioning.
Key risk: Powell must now address Iran conflict inflation impact + Trump 15% tariffs. CPI at 2.4% pre-Iran strikes. If stagflation flagged, bearish for risk assets.
Powell term ending May 15, 2026 — Kevin Warsh potential successor. Leadership transition adds uncertainty premium.
Site is Day 17 — GSC organic signals still expected imminently (day 14-21 window). 405+ pages live. FOMC content perfectly timed for organic arrival.
Social drafts saved to /reports/community-drafts/2026-03-17-social-drafts-v13.md
Social card saved to /public/social-fomc-day1-market-rally.svg
Posting schedule: Tue PM FOMC tweets (5) + Discord briefing → Wed AM FOMC eve reminder → Wed PM post-decision reaction → Thu newsletter → Fri poll + review → Sat BTCFi thread → Sun Aave V4
